$:/plugins/byper/advanced-search/readme.title: $:/plugins/byper/advanced-search/readme
$:/plugins/byper/advanced-search/readme.text:
! Advanced Search

An enhanced search plugin for TiddlyWiki that provides an IDE-like code search experience.

!! ✨ Features

* ''Quick Access'': Press `Ctrl + K` (Mac: `Cmd + K`) to immediately open the search modal.
* ''Block-Based Search'': Matches content by paragraphs/blocks, precisely showing matches.
* ''Highlighting'': Highlights keywords in both search results and the open tiddler.
* ''Smart Navigation'': Automatically opens and scrolls to the exact target position upon clicking a result.
* ''Real-time Preview'': Shows results in real-time as you type, sorted by modification date.
* ''Keyboard Navigation'': Supports `↑` `↓` to select results, `←` `→` to collapse/expand groups, and `Enter` to open.

!! 🚀 Usage

# Install the plugin and restart TiddlyWiki.
# Use `Ctrl + K` (Windows/Linux) or `Cmd + K` (macOS) to open the search box.
# Type keywords to browse matching results.
# Click an item or press Enter to jump to the result.

---

! 高级搜索 (Advanced Search)

一个增强版的 TiddlyWiki 搜索插件，提供类似 IDE 的代码搜索体验。

!! ✨ 特性

* ''快捷键唤起''：按下 `Ctrl + K` (Mac: `Cmd + K`) 快速打开搜索框。
* ''分块检索''：按段落（块）匹配内容，精确展示包含关键词的段落。
* ''高亮显示''：在搜索结果和打开的条目中高亮关键词。
* ''智能导航''：点击结果自动打开并滚动到目标位置。
* ''实时预览''：输入时实时显示结果，按修改时间排序。
* ''键盘操作''：支持 `↑` `↓` 选择结果，`←` `→` 折叠/展开分组，`Enter` 打开。

!! 🚀 使用指南

# 安装插件后重启 TiddlyWiki。
# 使用快捷键 `Ctrl + K` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd + K` (macOS) 打开搜索框。
# 输入关键词，浏览匹配结果。
# 点击条目或按回车跳转。

! Settings

Configure the behavior of the Advanced Search plugin.

---

!! Search Results Behavior

<$checkbox tiddler="$:/config/byper/advanced-search/expand-context" field="text" checked="yes" unchecked="no" default="yes"> Expand result context by default</$checkbox>

Check this box to automatically expand the context snippets for all search results. Uncheck it to show only titles initially.
